reviews.comment:
Para ser de las pocas YPF en muchísimos kilómetros sobre esa ruta, deja bastante que desear como servicio de ruta.
Sólo elegimos estaciones YPF cuando viajamos a Argentina, cuando llegamos allí pudimos usar el baño pero los servicios gastronómicos a los que nos tenía acostumbrados la marca, eran deficitarios.

(Translated by Google)
For being one of the few YPF stations along that route, its roadside service leaves much to be desired.
We only choose YPF stations when traveling to Argentina. When we arrived, we were able to use the restroom, but the food services we've come to expect from the brand were inadequate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNReXZILUx3EAE
